calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: modulatory-bias-selection-authority route-range AMEND substrate-readiness (P0 routed-range gate; 569f/661/654a)
items.note: Substrate-readiness diagnostic (claim_ids=[]) for the route-range AMEND. ARM_0 routing OFF vs ARM_1 routing ON (source=cand_world_summary), both with authority ON + e2_world_forward + SD-056 online. PASS (route_range_substrate_ready) confirms the P0 routed-range gate and unblocks the SEPARATE per-claim behavioural retests of ARC-065/MECH-294/ARC-062/MECH-309/MECH-341. Below-floor self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue. Routed by failure_autopsy_569f-661-654a_2026-06-10.

items.title: scaffolded_sd054 FULL three-leg readiness (harm-pathway ON): Stage-0 zgoal + P1 survival + P2 contact + P2 zgoal, the residual-leg gate after 603k
items.note: Substrate-readiness diagnostic (claim_ids=[]). 603k cleared ONLY the survival leg (P1 survival 3/3); never exercised P2 benefit-contact / P2 z_goal; Stage-0 z_goal>0.4 on 1/3. 603m runs the FULL curriculum (Stage-0->Stage-0b->P0->Stage-H->P1->P2) with scaffold_train_harm_pathway=ON so the agent reaches P2 alive and all four legs are measurable. PASS=G0 AND G1 AND G2 AND G3 (each >=2/3) -> flips scaffolded_sd054_onboarding ready=True + unblocks SD-049 GAP-2 / MECH-229/230/260. Non-vacuity: harm-pathway-discriminative AND reached-P2-alive, else substrate_not_ready_requeue.

items.title: SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance bridge BEHAVIOURAL re-test (scored evidence; successor to V3-EXQ-603i, the pending_retest_after_substrate). Full 4-arm + nav-control discriminative Stage-H run on the 603k+603j-fixed substrate: ARM_BASE_IA_ONLY (bridge OFF) / ARM_RELIEF_BRIDGE / ARM_SAFETY_BRIDGE / ARM_RELIEF_SAFETY_BRIDGE (bridge halves) / ARM_NAV_CONTROL (bridge OFF, spawn-in-reef nav-competence control). ALL arms turn ON the two now-validated substrate fixes: scaffold_train_harm_pathway=True (603k PASS -> clears the 603i PRIMARY nav/survival-competence ceiling; ARM_HARM_ON_NAV G_H 2/3 vs OFF 0/3, harm_eval range 0.133) and escape_use_trained_safety_signal=True + MECH-303 terrain + MECH-304 store + MECH-302 comparator (603j PASS -> the SAFETY half credits non-vacuously via the trained threat-absence signal, mean 0.89 >= 0.5 floor). PRIMARY DV best_bridge_G_H >= 2/3 AND > G_H_BASE. Per-half non-vacuity readiness preconditions retained as a SAFETY NET (each enabled bridge half credits >=2/3 before G_H scored; else self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue, NOT a false weakens).
items.note: Real scored evidence retest (claim_ids=[SD-059, MECH-358], experiment_purpose=evidence, evidence_direction_per_claim emitted), NOT a readiness diagnostic. Base = v3_exq_603i. Both substrate prereqs green (603j safety-half wiring + 603k Stage-H harm-pathway training). Evidence-direction mapping (protects the claims): readiness-not-met -> non_contributory (substrate_not_ready_requeue); PASS -> supports; readiness-met + primary-FAIL + nav-control clears -> weakens (bridge_insufficient_env_survivable); readiness-met + primary-FAIL + nav-control also fails -> non_contributory (navigation_survival_competence_ceiling). validate_experiments --strict + validate_queue + dry-run smoke all PASS (dry scale correctly self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue because the trained safety predictor has not populated at the tiny dry budget; relief half + approach fire). Do NOT edit claims.yaml/governance; evidence folds in via a later /governance cycle once it runs.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization-necessity: task-distribution-shift phase-3 redesign (supersedes 610f)
items.note: IGW-20260609-038 / failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610f_2026-06-08 user-confirmed route (a). Replaces the noise-only phase-3 with a genuine TASK-DISTRIBUTION SHIFT (SD-054 reef-bipartite layout + hazard_food_attraction=0.8 -> flee-to-reef single dominant optimum conflicting with the phase-0-2 forage policy) so the un-crystallized control suffers catastrophic forgetting (D2 collapse) while the EWC-anchored arm resists (D1). reef_enabled in all phases keeps world_obs_dim=275 constant. Decisive substrate-incapacity fork pre-registered: if D2 still fails on a genuine task-shift -> accept INV-074 substrate_ceiling and STOP the 610 cascade. 5 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 2500 ep x 200 steps; verified wiring (_assert_fixes_wired) + D3 non-vacuity gate carried from 610f.

items.title: ARC-062 GAP-B rule-apprehension behavioural falsifier -- longer CRF maturation re-run of 654a
items.note: Longer-maturation re-run of V3-EXQ-654a (MECH-309 + ARC-062). 654a self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue: crf_frac_active=0.137<0.30, 0/3 ON seeds matured even with crf_persist=True. ONLY change: maturation window P0+P1 100->240 ep (P0 60->150, P1 40->90) so the persisted CandidateRuleField clears the 0.3 C1c floor before scoring. Keeps crf_persist + within-arm rule_state counterfactual (recorded per seed) + C1c/C1d non-vacuity gate (self-routes non_contributory if maturation still fails). If matured-and-firing field STILL shows within-arm counterfactual ~0 + no committed-class lift, 654b joins the E3-commit-readout cluster (569f/661) confirming selection-authority coupling is the ceiling. Routed by failure_autopsy_569f-661-654a_2026-06-10.

Successor to V3-EXQ-591 (FAIL 2026-05-26, stuck Phase 0 under old 0.70 gate). PRIMARY C1: every seed reaches curriculum phase>=1. Full GAP-14 closure (curriculum-vs-flat, V3-EXQ-591 successor) still waits on prereq (b) goal-pipeline non-trivial z_goal, owned by goal_pipeline:GAP-4 / behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-C. Do NOT re-queue V3-EXQ-591 until prereq (b) clears.

items.title: Affective fishtank showcase -- protoemotional register telemetry feed for fishtank_viz.html
items.note: Diagnostic TELEMETRY showcase (claim_ids=[], experiment_purpose=diagnostic); does NOT weight governance. Feeds the upgraded fishtank_viz.html (FISHTANK_VIZ_VERSION 2026-06-10.1) with an episode_log exposing the affective/protoemotional register: nociceptive cascade (z_harm_s/un/a), drive, wanting (z_goal), tonic vigor (MECH-320), orexin override (SD-037), PAG freeze (MECH-279, capped), blocked-agency assert pole (MECH-353 + env action-blocks), MECH-307 excite/dread valence. Affect stack runs as telemetry on the 524 reef stack so the fish stays behaviour-legible. Outcome = non-degeneracy of core channels (z_harm_a/un/drive) + blocked-agency engagement + freeze-not-locked. Dry-run smoke PASS. Script landed 2026-06-10 (ree-v3 9f3b1e1); queue-add was held ~16min on a dangling V3-EXQ-662 ghost (concurrent renumber-vs-DB-snapshot race) and added once the queue validated clean.
